0.text: 45 mm mass lesion in the lower lobe of the left lung, reduced from 64 mm

1.text: Increased pleuroparenchymal fibrotic density around the mass lesion in the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Development of subsegmental atelectasis around the mass lesion in the lower lobe of the left lung

3.text: Subcentimeter nodule in the superior segment of the right lower lobe increased from 1 mm to 2 mm

4.text: Nodule in the posterior part of the left upper lobe lingula superior segment increased from 3 mm to 4 mm

5.text: Nodule in the posterior segment of the left upper lobe increased from 1 mm to 3 mm
